user.title: Add a NEEO Brain
user.description: Enter the Brain's LAN IP. The default port is 3000.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Brain at that address.

init.title: Per-room power-toggle settings
init.description:
Pick a default recipe and decide whether each room joins the Global-Power-ON. Global-Power-OFF always affects every room.

{room_count} rooms configured.

abort.brain_not_ready: Brain inventory not loaded yet - retry once the Brain is reachable.

execute_recipe.name: Execute Recipe
execute_recipe.description: Trigger a NEEO recipe by its room and recipe keys.

trigger_macro.name: Trigger Macro
trigger_macro.description: Fire a device-level macro (VOLUME UP, POWER ON, ...).
